user.title: Domoriks setup
user.description: Enter connection settings and choose how to configure modules.

manual.title: Configure modules manually
manual.description: Enter module IDs and output counts as `id:outputs`, comma-separated.

upload.title: Import project JSON
upload.description: Select your Domoriks project JSON file.

error.invalid_modules: Modules must be formatted as id:outputs.
error.invalid_json: Could not parse JSON — make sure it is valid project JSON.
error.no_modules_found: No output modules found in the uploaded JSON.
error.file_selector_not_supported: File upload is not supported in this frontend.

command.name: Send command
command.description: Send a raw Domoriks command string (e.g. rc 64 0 16 or rh 64 0 8).

command.name: Command
